adversarial_failures.issue: RDT depth-mode lookup p95 slower than best baseline

modification.problem: Depth-only RDT partitions are coarse and suffer from poor shard-resize stability under modulo mapping.
modification.smallest_rdt_based_fix: Use ancestor bucket IDs (ancestor(key, k)) and stable shard mapping (jump-consistent-hash on bucket ID).
modification.dual_extension: Dual-number-guided tuning of shard depth on a smooth sharding objective.
